Model Fit

  • There are three components in the model where unobservables show up.
  • \(a_i = x_i' \hat \gamma^D + \hat \varepsilon_i\), \(c_i^W=x_i'\hat \gamma^W + \hat \varepsilon_i^W\), \(c_i^F=x_i'\hat \gamma^F + \hat \varepsilon_i^F\).
  • Solve the with and without \(\hat \epsilon_i\) and show scatter plots.
